# services.gemstash

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gemstash`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gemstash.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable gemstash, a cache for rubygems.org and a private gem server. |
| `services.gemstash.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for the port in {option}`services.gemstash.bind`. |
| `services.gemstash.package` | `package` | The gemstash package to use. |
| `services.gemstash.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration for Gemstash. The details can be found at in [gemstash documentation](https://github.com/rubygems/gemstash/blob/master/man/gemstash-configuration.5.md). Each key set here is automatically prefixed with ":" to match the gemstash expectations. |
| `services.gemstash.settings.base_path` | `absolute path` | Path to store the gem files and the sqlite database. If left unchanged, the directory will be created. |
| `services.gemstash.settings.bind` | `string` | Host and port combination for the server to listen on. |
| `services.gemstash.settings.db_adapter` | `null or one of "sqlite3", "postgres", "mysql", "mysql2"` | Which database type to use. For choices other than sqlite3, the dbUrl has to be specified as well. |
| `services.gemstash.settings.db_url` | `null or string` | The database to connect to when using postgres, mysql, or mysql2. |
